▸ **visitNotIgnoredFiles**(`tree`, `dirPath`, `visitor`): `void`

Utility to act on all files in a tree that are not ignored by git.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type |
| :------ | :------ |
| `tree` | [`Tree`](/docs/reference/devkit/Tree) |
| `dirPath` | `string` |
| `visitor` | (`path`: `string`) => `void` |

#### Returns

`void`
